title: Consumer product safety acts and regulations - Canada.ca
content:
## Consumer product safety acts and regulations
Acts and Regulations applicable to the products found in this section:

## Consumer and Clinical Radiation Protection
- Radiation Emitting Devices Act

## Consumer Product Safety

### Canada Consumer Product Safety Act (CCPSA)
- Canada Consumer Product Safety Act (CCPSA) Canada Consumer Product Safety Act Exemption Regulations (Consumer Products)
- Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Exemption Regulations (Consumer Products)

### Administrative Monetary Penalties (Consumer Products) Regulations
- Guide to Notices of Violation and Administrative Monetary Penalties under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Harper Government Announces New Fines to Strengthen the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Administrative Monetary Penalties (Consumer Products) Regulations

### Consumer Chemicals and Containers Regulations, 2001
- Consumer Chemicals and Containers Regulations, 2001 Reference Manual for the Consumer Chemicals and Containers Regulations , 2001 of the Hazardous Products Act Hazard Symbols Industry Guide to the Consumer Chemicals and Containers Regulations, 2001  Third Edition
- Reference Manual for the Consumer Chemicals and Containers Regulations , 2001 of the Hazardous Products Act
- Industry Guide to the Consumer Chemicals and Containers Regulations, 2001  Third Edition

#### For other acts that may provide additional information, see:
- The Consumer Packaging and Labelling Act
- Textile Labelling Act

#### Other relevant legislation
- The Canadian Environmental Protection Act (1999)
- New Substances Notification Regulations (Chemicals and Polymers)
- New Substances Notification Regulations (Organisms)

## Cosmetics Acts and Regulations
Cosmetics Acts and Regulations for which Health Canada is the Primary Authority:
- Cosmetic Regulations
- Consumer Chemicals and Containers Regulations (CCCR) Applicable to the Cosmetic Regulations The Cosmetic Regulations officially cite the Consumer Chemicals and Containers Regulations(CCCR) as they read on September 30, 2001. The Cosmetic Regulations do not refer to the new Consumer Chemicals and Containers Regulations (2001)(CCCR 2001), dated October 1, 2001. The Consumer Chemicals and Containers Regulations (2001)(CCCR 2001) do not apply to cosmetic products pursuant to the Cosmetic Regulations.
